since_last: 65% of 86 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +2.20%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 65% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.44% · BTC +0.23% · Gold -1.63% · Nasdaq100 -3.29%. 65% of 86 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +2.20%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +2.20%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.34%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CEVA is the standout at +8.84%
cards.body: Leaders: CEVA +8.84%, MU +5.06%, ARM +4.10%, MRVL +2.42%, VRT +2.07%. Laggards: EQIX -4.12%, SAP -1.87%, PLTR -1.75%, BABA -1.46%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.81% at $154.85
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.81% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
